query:
-- Flag high-revenue zero-cost services that clearly need a wholesale cost
-- These are large internet/fibre/SIP services with significant revenue but $0 cost

-- 6 Channels Business SIP (3 × $864 revenue)
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] 6 Channels SIP has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost (ChannelHaus: ~$318/mo at $53/ch, Access4: TBC)')
WHERE planName LIKE '%6 Channels Business SIP%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- Large internet services with $0 cost - flag for review
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] High-value internet service has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost with provider')
WHERE serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Mobile') 
  AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' 
  AND monthlyCost = 0.00
  AND monthlyRevenue > 200.00
  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%');

-- Teams Voice SIP Trunk - flag for review
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] Teams Voice SIP Trunk has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost')
WHERE planName LIKE '%Teams Voice SIP%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- Mark genuinely $0 cost items as accepted (Voicemail, call usage, included features)
-- These are Access4 included features with no separate wholesale charge
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [ACCEPTED] Voicemail is included in UCXcel bundle - $0 wholesale cost is correct')
WHERE planName = 'Voicemail' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00
  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%ACCEPTED%');

UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [ACCEPTED] Voice usage/telephone usage is pass-through billing - $0 wholesale cost is correct')
WHERE planName IN ('Voice - Telephone Usage', 'Voice - Services') AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00
  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%ACCEPTED%');

UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [ACCEPTED] Call pack is included in UCXcel bundle - $0 wholesale cost is correct')
WHERE planName LIKE '%Included Local National Mobile Call Pack%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00
  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%ACCEPTED%');

-- Final summary
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasRealCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0.00 AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flaggedForReview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0.00 AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%ACCEPTED%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as acceptedZeroCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0.00 AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR (discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%' AND discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%ACCEPTED%')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as uncategorisedZeroCost,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalMonthlyCost,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalMonthlyRevenue
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss';
